studies.title: A RANDOMIZED, UNCONCLUSED, CONTROLLED CLINICAL STUDY TO EVALUATE THE EFFECTIVENESS AND SAFETY OF THE Ecovery APP IN PATIENTS WITH SUBACUTE TO CHRONIC UNSPECIFIC PAIN OF THE LOWER BACK
studies.brief_summary:
A RANDOMIZED, UNBLINDED, CONTROLLED CLINICAL STUDY TO EVALUATE THE EFFECTIVENESS AND SAFETY OF THE Ecovery APP IN PATIENTS WITH SUBACUTE TO CHRONIC UNSPECIFIC PAIN OF THE LOWER BACK.

Recruitment by study centers: multicenter.
Study population:	
Adult (≥18 years) patients with nonspecific low back pain of >6 weeks duration.
Population size:	
Part 1: 80 patients
Part 2: 236 patients
Study objective: to evaluate the efficacy and safety of the eCovery app. 
Duration of the study for the individual patient: 
Treatment phase: 12 weeks (patient exercising at home), 1 visit at week 0 and at week 13 at the study site.
= maximum of 13 weeks
Study treatment: standard treatment according to standard care ± eCovery App
Study design: this is a randomized, unblinded, controlled clinical trial of maximum 13 weeks duration. Patients will receive the standard treatment according to standard care (and in the intervention arm additionally the eCovery App). Endpoints will be collected at week
